specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive's customers reported losing access to their mobile app due to stolen credentials in 2024?
answer: It was documented by the cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive that roughly 2% of their customers had reported losing access to their mobile app due to stolen credentials in 2024.
dr_question: Referencing the information shared in the April 2025 article from Help Net Security, what external cybersecurity market data involving the automotive industry should Elexion Automotive analyze by the end of Q4 2025 to protect consumer data and safety?
